description: Simulate device uplink, image upload, and food recognition from the admin console.
protocolDescription: Runs upload.url → PUT image → meal.record.create → food.analysis.request. Upload a photo only.
protocolHint: Enter device ID (internal id or deviceSn from device list), pick an image and weight, then run once. Uses bound user when user ID is empty.
protocolCorsHint: Direct browser PUT to S3 may be blocked by CORS. Use "Existing objectKey" or enable "Skip browser upload".
skipBrowserUpload: Skip browser upload (credential only, for S3 CORS)
skipBrowserUploadHelp: Returns uploadUrl and objectKey. Upload via curl, device, or AWS CLI, then run recognition. objectKey is filled automatically.
protocolCredentialReady: Upload credential ready. Upload via curl/device, then switch to "Existing objectKey" or confirm the path below and run again.
protocolUploadUrlMissing: Missing uploadUrl or objectKey in response
deviceIdProtocolHelp: ID or deviceSn from device list (protocol topic deviceId)
userIdHelp: Run upload and recognition as this end-user (required)
deviceIdHelp: Optional context for device-scoped upload or recognition
iotPayloadHelp: EMQX webhook body, or use topic + payload directly
iotHttpDisabled: HTTP uplink ingest is disabled in this deployment. Use the RabbitMQ bridge or change configuration.
commandHint: To send device commands, open Device List and use the Command panel on a device.
analyzeMissingFields: User ID, meal ID, imageKey and weight are required
